anania.title: Revsticks x Anania.ch Collaboration
anania.heroSubtitle: Official collaboration between Revsticks and Anania.ch
anania.description: Anania.ch is a versatile Swiss online shop specializing in affordable electronics, home accessories, and creative gift ideas. The range extends from practical everyday helpers like printers, cables, and gaming accessories to stylish decorative items – ideal for tech fans and lifestyle enthusiasts. Particularly appreciated is the fast shipping with Swiss Post and the personal customer service. With fair prices, easy navigation, and ongoing offers, Anania.ch is a reliable address for clever bargain hunters and spontaneous gift ideas.
anania.ctaDescription: Explore Revsticks products crafted in collaboration with Anania.ch

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: How it all began
story.heroSubtitle: Building low cost and good looking products in Switzerland
story.introText: RevSticks was born from a simple vision: to create high-quality, affordable supermoto products that are designed in Switzerland and made by riders for riders.
story.dreamText: It all started with a dream - the vision to build low cost yet beautiful products right here in Switzerland. We believed that quality doesn't have to be expensive and that true innovation comes from passion.
story.passionText: As passionate supermoto riders ourselves, we understood the community's needs firsthand. We knew what products were missing and how we could make them better.
story.swissQualityText: Made in Switzerland stands for precision, quality, and reliability. These values are lived in every product we develop.
story.communityText: Our community is at the center of everything we do. Their feedback, ideas, and passion drive us to always get better.
story.futureText: What started as a dream has become reality today. But this is just the beginning. We continue to work on developing the best products for the supermoto community.
story.ctaText: Discover our products and become part of the RevSticks family.

powdercoatColors.title: Powdercoat Colors
powdercoatColors.description: Discover our range of high-quality powdercoat colors for your supermoto parts. Choose from vibrant finishes that provide both protection and style.
powdercoatColors.confirmSelection: Confirm your color selection to continue.
powdercoatColors.infoDescription: All our powdercoat colors feature UV-resistant properties and sandblasting preparation for the best adhesion and durability. Each finish is professionally applied to ensure a smooth, long-lasting result that will protect and enhance your supermoto parts.

powdercoatInformation.title: Powdercoat Information - RevSticks
powdercoatInformation.description: Shipping information and contact details for our powdercoat services. Send your parts to Switzerland for professional finishing.
powdercoatInformation.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know about sending your parts for professional powdercoating
powdercoatInformation.shippingDescription: Please send your parts to the following address in Switzerland.
powdercoatInformation.customOrderDescription: Looking for custom colors or parts that aren't available in our shop? We're here to help! Contact us through any of the channels below to discuss your specific needs and get a personalized quote.
powdercoatInformation.plasticRemovalDescription: Remove all plastic parts, rubber seals, and non-metallic components before shipping. The high temperatures during powder coating can damage or destroy these materials.
powdercoatInformation.separationDescription: Disassemble and separate all individual parts from each other. Each part must be processed separately to ensure an even and high-quality coating.
powdercoatInformation.importantNoteDescription: Proper preparation is crucial for the quality of powder coating. Improperly prepared parts may lead to delays or additional costs.
powdercoatInformation.instagramDescription: Follow us and send direct messages
powdercoatInformation.ctaDescription: Browse our available powdercoat services and get started with your custom finishing project today.
